title: Shovels Permit
description: A building permit record from the Shovels API representing an official document issued by city or county authorities required before commencing construction or alterations.

id.description: Unique permit identifier assigned by Shovels

final_date.description: Date the permit was finalized or completed

description.description: Description of the permitted construction or alteration work

job_value.description: Estimated value of the permitted job in US dollars

tags.description: Permit classification tags indicating work type (e.g., solar, roofing, hvac, adu)

property_type.description: Type of property receiving the permitted work

contractor_id.description: Shovels ID of the associated contractor

jurisdiction.description: Name of the jurisdiction that issued the permit

inspection_pass_rate.description: Ratio of inspections passed to total inspections for this permit

Address.description: US address associated with the permit

geo_id.description: Shovels unique geographic identifier for the address

name.description: Formatted full address in USPS notation
